chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – Cutting to lower (the genitals of) the girls

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/66)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/66)
text: خِتَانُ الْغُلَامِ مِنَ السُّنَّةِ وَ خَفْضُ الْجَوَارِي لَيْسَ مِنَ السُّنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘Circumcision of the boy is from the Sunnah, and cutting (the genitals) of the girls is not from the Sunnah’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Circumcision for boys is because of Sunnah but circumcision for girls is not because of Sunnah.”’
